message:
feat: expand session auth, harden lease coordinator, and add epoch transition events

Concurrent agent improvements across franken-node subsystems:

api/session_auth.rs (+690/-135):
- Major expansion of session authentication with additional verification
  paths, token lifecycle management, and audit event emission

connector/eviction_saga.rs (+16):
- Refine eviction saga state transitions with additional guard checks

connector/lease_coordinator.rs (+68):
- Harden lease coordination with additional timeout and renewal paths

control_plane/epoch_transition_barrier.rs (+39):
- Add epoch transition barrier event hooks for observability

runtime/checkpoint.rs (+40):
- Expand checkpoint logic with additional validation guards

supply_chain/provenance_gate.rs (+2):
- Minor provenance gate adjustment

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
